title:
@Vtrivedy10: more evals != better agents

rawContent:
Tweet by @Vtrivedy10 (Viv)
Author bio: agents & evals @LangChain, prev @awscloud, phd cs @templeuniv
Text: more evals != better agents

at @LangChain, every eval our team maintains is like a noisy vector that shapes agent behavior in production

as teams hill climb hundreds or thousands of evals to “improve their agents”, this problem of bad evals contributing noisy behavior compounds

here’s a practical guide on:
- how we design small subsets of targeted evals that test important abilities for our Task
- our team’s shared responsibility approach for justifying every eval’s value and what it measures
- metrics that influence our decisions beyond accuracy
- how we store and run evals
